response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level software development experience with a strong focus on open-source technologies, full-stack development, and technical leadership. While his background aligns well with many requirements, his German language proficiency is below the required C1 level, and his leadership experience appears more hands-on than strategic/executive.
strengths: Proven track record in senior software development roles with exposure to diverse tech stacks (Python, Linux, UML-adjacent design via GIS platforms).
Strong open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and expertise in architecting scalable systems (e.g., real-time data integration at Sociomantic).
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and community engagement (e.g., Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos).
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' falling short of the required C1 level.
Leadership experience is primarily technical (e.g., staff engineer roles) rather than executive/operational (e.g., no explicit team management or P&L responsibility).
Limited explicit experience in IT security, risk management, or compliance—key requirements for client advisory roles.
